holdings.infoBox: QEFA is an equity ETF with a total of 657 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 2.44%, Novartis AG at 2.04%, Roche Holding AG at 1.83%, AstraZeneca at 1.78%, and Nestlé at 1.64%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR MSCI EAFE StrategicFactors ETF (QEFA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI EAFE Factor Mix A-Series index. The fund tracks an index of securities from developed markets in Europe, Australia and the Far East. The index equal-weights 3 subindexes: value, minimum volatility and quality. QEFA was launched on Jun 4, 2014 and is issued by State Street.
